name: Exclusion of Income from Specified U.S. Possessions

eligibility.description: Must be a bona fide resident of Guam, American Samoa, or the CNMI for the entire taxable year. Does not apply to U.S. government employees.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes income derived from sources within Guam, American Samoa, or the Northern Mariana Islands from U.S. federal gross income for bona fide residents of those possessions.
